description: Unit tests for the TemplateFactory class, including methods for sanitization, content manipulation, and HTML generation.

classes.name: TemplateFactory
classes.description: A class responsible for creating and manipulating HTML templates with support for sanitization and dynamic content.

methods.name: toHtml
methods.description: Generates and returns the HTML element based on the template and current content.

methods.name: getContent
methods.description: Retrieves the content entries as an array, filtering out empty or null content.

methods.name: hasContent
methods.description: Checks if the current content has any non-empty entries.

methods.name: changeContent
methods.description: Updates the content entries with new values.
